name: paperless
description: Manage documents in a Paperless-ngx document management system. Search documents by full text or filters, retrieve document metadata and content, upload new documents, update metadata, delete documents, and list tags/correspondents/document types.

parameters.operation: The operation to perform: search, get, download, upload, update, delete, list_tags, list_correspondents, list_document_types (required)
parameters.query: Full-text search query string (for search operation)
parameters.document_id: Numeric ID of the document (for get, download, update, delete)
parameters.title: Document title (for upload or update)
parameters.tags: Comma-separated tag names for filtering (search) or setting (upload/update)
parameters.name: Correspondent name for filtering (search) or setting (upload/update)
parameters.category: Document type name for filtering (search) or setting (upload/update)
parameters.content: Text content to upload as a new document (for upload)
parameters.limit: Maximum number of results to return (default: 25, for search)

returns: JSON object with status, message, and data containing document details, search results, or lists of tags/correspondents/document types
